summary: The South Bay's funding frenzy continues: nearly $4 billion raised across 23 deals in recent weeks, with mega-rounds going to AI plays like Nexthop ($500M), MatX ($500M), and Rhoda AI ($450M). Hardware and robotics also scored big—Frore Systems landed $143M in San Jose, while Ayar Labs hit $500M. Meanwhile, most local companies are holding steady on hiring, though seven are actively expanding.
